title: codiphus nitidus
intro: Codiphus nitidus, also known as the 'Golden Senna' or 'Sensitive Plant', is a tropical flowering plant native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a laxative due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Codiphus nitidus include its use in treating constipation, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in tea or capsule form, with some cultures also using the plant's pods as a natural dye.
